subject: URGENT: Production DB is down
body:
Hey,

The production database cluster went unresponsive at 14:32 IST. Users are seeing 500 errors across the dashboard. DevOps is looking into it but we need someone from the backend team to check the connection pool config ASAP.

Please jump on this immediately.

subject: Quarterly OKR review — deadline Friday
body:
Hi,

Just a reminder that the OKR self-assessment is due this Friday (May 9). Please fill in your progress against each key result in the shared Google Sheet and send me a brief summary by EOD Thursday so I can consolidate before the leadership sync.

Thanks.

subject: This week in AI: GPT-5 rumours, new open-source models
body:
Welcome to your weekly roundup.

1. GPT-5 speculation heats up after leaked benchmark results.
2. Meta releases a new 70B open-weight model.
3. Google announces Gemini Ultra pricing changes.

Read more on our blog: https://techdigest.io/weekly/2026-05-05

Unsubscribe: https://techdigest.io/unsub?uid=abc123

subject: Re: Sprint planning — moved to Wednesday
body:
Hi all,

Sprint planning has been moved from Tuesday to Wednesday 2 PM. Same Zoom link.

Please update your calendars. I have sent an updated invite.

Thanks,
Raj

subject: Reminder: mandatory compliance training by May 15
body:
Dear team,

This is a reminder that all employees must complete the annual data-privacy compliance training by May 15, 2026. The course is available on the internal LMS portal.

Failure to complete it by the deadline may result in access restrictions.

Regards,
HR Team

subject: Invoice #4821 — payment details
body:
Hi,

Please find the payment details for invoice #4821:

Amount: $12,500.00
Bank: First National Bank
Account: 9283-7461-0023
Routing: 021000021

Let me know once the transfer is initiated. We need this processed before end of week.

Regards,
Sarah

body:

subject: Code review request: auth-service PR #312
body:
Hey,

Could you review my PR for the auth-service refactor? It is a fairly contained change — just swapping the JWT library and updating the middleware.

PR link: https://github.com/company/auth-service/pull/312

No rush, but would be great to get it merged before the Wednesday sprint.

Cheers,
Deepak
